fix(manifest): add orientation + min_viewport_width

Required by the viewport-support compliance check. Without these,
'fas check' on this app fails. Defaults to 'any' orientation and 360
px min viewport width.

Trigger CF Pages build

Chess Clock — beautiful timer for over-the-board play

12 preset time controls (bullet, blitz, rapid, classical) with
increment support. Tap to switch, pause/resume, move counter,
red time warning under 30s, tenths display under 20s. Top player
rotated 180 degrees for face-to-face play. 202KB bundle, offline PWA.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(manifest): add orientation + min_viewport_width

Required by the viewport-support compliance check. Without these,
'fas check' on this app fails. Defaults to 'any' orientation and 360
px min viewport width.

docs(CLAUDE): adopt slim per-repo shape

Refactors this CLAUDE.md to the slim convention documented in
SKILLS.md. Platform-wide knowledge (tech stack, brand, deploy,
mobile rules, paths) lives in SKILLS.md as the single source of
truth -- duplicating it per repo just creates drift surface area
that breaks AI agents over time. This file now only carries
what is unique to this repo.
Add platform docs link to CLAUDE.md

Fix: vendor SDK into repo so CF Pages builds succeed

SDK was a workspace link to a directory outside the repo — CF Pages
can't resolve it during build. Moved SDK source into web/src/sdk/
with direct relative imports. Two prior deploys were failing for this.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: remove dead Firebase, wire RSVP to API, fix SPA routing

- Remove firebase dependency and lib/firebase.ts (dead code)
- RSVP button now calls platform API (POST/DELETE /meetup/events/:id/rsvp)
- Add _redirects for CF Pages SPA routing (fixes 404 on direct links)
- Fix useAuth to use UserWithRoles type from SDK

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs(CLAUDE): drop stale platform/ + infra/ path segments

These paths never existed for external contributors and the auditor
repo is private. AI agents reading this CLAUDE.md were being told to
look in directories that don't resolve. Aligned with the post-sweep
flat layout described in the public SKILLS.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix root package.json: scripts must be inside scripts object
Fix web/package.json: add build scripts and dependencies
Initial commit from standalone template
Add web tests for E2EE and notification mute logic
Add E2EE for P2P direct and channel transport
Add offline sync status badges and retry actions

Remove .env.production — Firebase config now in CF Pages env vars

Deployment config is centralized in Cloudflare Pages project settings,
not in the repo. Developers don't need env files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add .env.production with Firebase client config for CF Pages build

Vite requires VITE_FIREBASE_* env vars at build time (they get inlined
into the JS bundle). Without these, the app crashes at runtime because
Firebase SDK receives undefined config values. These are public client
config values, not secrets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Merge pull request #88 from brightside-life/copilot/fix-ci-merge-blocker

Fix CI: resolve react-simple-maps/React 18 peer conflict, update workflows to Node 22 + Node 24 actions runtime
